testsuite.name: com.carbooking.gui.tests.positive.RegistrationPositiveTests

testcase.name: testUserRegistration

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: ОШИБКА: Регистрация прошла, но автоматический вход не выполнен. URL: http://localhost:5173/register expected [true] but found [false]

You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.31.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
